# `pub` (dart ecosystem)

<!-- The reference table below this banner is regenerated by `make generate`. Handwritten prose below the table lives in internal/support/prose/. -->

Bomly uses this chain when it finds `pub` evidence.

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package manager | `pub` |
| Ecosystem | `dart` |
| Detector chain | `pub-native-detector`, `pub-detector`, `syft-detector` |
| Evidence patterns | `pubspec.lock`, `pubspec.yaml`, `pubspec.yml` |
| Install-first support | No |
| Native command hints | `dart`, `syft for bomly-lite` |
